steps.title: Spot the similarity goal
steps.content: The prompt asks the student to emphasize a similarity between the Yukon and Rhine rivers. The key signal is the need to show what the two rivers have in common.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
Choice D — The Yukon and Rhine rivers are both ranked among the longest in the world. notes that both rivers are ranked among the longest in the world, directly stating a shared characteristic.
The other three choices each describe only one river or mention unrelated details like location or length without pointing out a common trait.
That matches Choice D — The Yukon and Rhine rivers are both ranked among the longest in the world..
